shape_decode: cmp,vp,vpc,naive = _,W,_,L : value_profile RESOLVES, naive BLOCKS, cmplog & value_profile_cmplog non-decisive. Pure VP-PRO (CMP_MAP distance-bucket gradient) family — VP's feedback is necessary and sufficient; I2S substitution (cmplog) is non-decisive.
decidable_reason: PARTIAL (sB monotonic-superset restoration 2026-06-18): vp_basin_escape RESTORED from r0 because it validated 3 sB branches (bloaty_147, lcms_2147, lcms_2417) via the arbiter's canonical value_distance fallback (winner_closer AND distance_gap>=0.15). The other branches remain honestly inconclusive. ORIGINAL round-1 decidable:false rationale (s4-scored, retained for record): After round-0 refuted all three terminal-corpus mechanisms (value_distance toward a fixed literal, struct_size on derived comparisons, basin-escape away from a magic), there is NO untried, G2-independent, G1-discriminating measurement of these branches with the built tools. The VP advantage in this shape is a SEARCH-TRAJECTORY property (VP retains near-miss intermediates its CMP_MAP rewards; naive discards them), which leaves no fingerprint in the TERMINAL resolving/blocking seed sets distinct from the circular fact that a resolving seed, by definition, already contains the answer. The one built tool the three priors did not use — corpus_queue:byte_freq_ratio (operand_enrichment) — is a cmplog-vs-naive I2S-availability measure, and cmplog is NON-DECISIVE in this shape; repurposing it VP-vs-naive would be both circular (G2) and non-discriminating (G1). Honest outcome: decidable:false (G3).

hypotheses.label: VP CMP_MAP steers AWAY from a dominant magic-value basin: there is no single target literal — the true side wants ANY value but the corpus-dominant magic. VP-resolving seeds DEPART the basin (multi-modal: spread over several non-magic format magics), while naive-blocking seeds are pinned at the basin value.

metric_definitions.naive_basin_lock_fraction: fraction of naive-BLOCKING seeds whose 4-byte prefix == the corpus-dominant magic (00 61 73 6d).
metric_definitions.vp_value_modality: count of DISTINCT non-magic 4-byte prefix values across the vp-resolving seed set (multi-modality test — a single-target gradient would be ~uni-modal at one constant; basin escape is multi-modal).
metric_definitions.basin_departure_lift: naive_basin_lock_fraction - vp_basin_lock_fraction (positive => VP escaped the basin that pinned naive).

hypotheses.prediction: G1: naive-blocking seeds are basin-locked (high naive_basin_lock_fraction) while VP-resolving seeds have left the basin (low vp_basin_lock_fraction) AND spread over MULTIPLE distinct non-magic prefixes (vp_value_modality >= 3). The direct-literal alternative (H1) predicts the opposite signature: VP seeds CONVERGING on ONE target value (low modality, ~uni-modal). This is the decisive separator from a fixed-target gradient: basin escape is divergence-AWAY-from-one-value (multi-modal), literal gradient is convergence-TOWARD-one-value (uni-modal).

hypotheses_tried: vp_structural_assembly_gradient (struct_size_ratio on harfbuzz_5708_h0 derived kern fields)
vp_basin_escape (value_distance away from corpus_dominant_basin, multi-modal, on bloaty_11)
round_0.outcome: ALL refuted (rule_not_met) across the 8 scorable branches (bloaty/11/147/150, libxml2/6325/6655, harfbuzz/5708/6006/6061, sqlite3/14793); several branches had all three rules score-and-fail.

why_no_fourth_hypothesis.byte_freq_ratio_operand_enrichment: REJECTED. tool_registry operand_enrichment (corpus_queue:byte_freq_ratio:target_vs_decoy) computes log2(target_frac_cmplog / target_frac_naive) — a CMPLOG-vs-naive enrichment. In this shape cmplog is NON-DECISIVE (the '_' in _,W,_,L) and the label_source states I2S substitution is neither necessary nor sufficient, so there is no reason to expect a cmplog corpus to be enriched in the gate target, and even if it were, it would measure the wrong (non-decisive) fuzzer. Repurposing the same byte_freq_ratio descriptor on value_profile-vs-naive instead is (a) NON-INDEPENDENT (G2): a value_profile-RESOLVING seed by definition carries bytes that take the true branch, i.e. contains the gate operand at the gate offset, so 'VP corpus enriched in the operand vs the naive blocking corpus' is the resolve pattern verified with itself; and (b) NON-DISCRIMINATING (G1): an I2S-substitution alternative predicts the IDENTICAL enrichment (it too plants the operand at the offset), so the test rules nothing out. It is the same circular signal as round-0's value_distance H1 (already empirically refuted), at coarser resolution.
why_no_fourth_hypothesis.match_gates_circularity: lcms_2147/2417 (nmcl), libxml2_6325_h1 (0xD800), harfbuzz_6006/6061_h1 (0x093x / 0x0B05), sqlite3_14793 (token class): the cards show the VP-resolving seeds already CONTAIN the exact operand (nmcl at 0x0c-0x0f; 05 0b / 3b 09 at the codepoint position; SQL token runs), while the naive-BLOCKING seeds carry a DIFFERENT VALID dispatch value (mntr; a non-vowel codepoint; punctuation), NOT a measurable near-miss on the gradient. So vp_min_distance ~ 0 only because a resolving seed contains the answer (circular), and the blocking seeds sit at an unrelated value, not at a mid-gradient distance. The intermediate near-miss inputs that VP retained and naive discarded — the only thing that would reveal the gradient — are in NEITHER terminal seed set. No terminal-corpus tool can see them.
why_no_fourth_hypothesis.mismatch_gates_artifact: bloaty_11/147/150: true side wants ANY non-magic value. The naive-blocking seeds being pinned AT the WASM magic (distance 0 / basin-locked) is a SELECTION ARTIFACT — the blocking seeds ARE the magic-matching ones by definition of which side blocks — not an independent VP signal. Both the round-0 mismatch inversion (vp FARTHER from magic) and the basin-escape multi-modality test were built on this artifact and both refuted.
why_no_fourth_hypothesis.structural_gate_exhausted: harfbuzz_5708_h0 (derived kern offset/length, operand_literal null): the ONLY branch whose discriminator (struct_size_lift on non-padding structure) is not pure operand-containment circularity. Round-0's vp_structural_assembly_gradient already measured exactly this (struct_size_ratio, reusing joint_necessity's size metric) and it was refuted. There is no sharper, untried framing in the signature; re-asserting the same struct-size rule on one branch would be chasing the same refutation.

data_realities_respected: value_profile (CMP_MAP) is a FEEDBACK, not a mutator, and is invisible in mutation_op — its effect is a search-trajectory property; no seed_lineage 'gradient event' is measurable, and the terminal seed-set tools cannot recover the retained near-miss intermediates that constitute the gradient.
I2S is untagged in mutation_op and cmplog is NON-DECISIVE here, so operand_enrichment (the cmplog-vs-naive byte_freq_ratio tool) is irrelevant to verifying the VP mechanism of this shape.

harfbuzz_5708_h0 is a structural-assembly gate with different-sized winning vs blocking seeds, so byte-alignment (byte_freq_ratio / fixed-operand distance) is FORBIDDEN there — leaving only struct_size_ratio, which round-0 already tried and which refuted.

branch_disposition.note: All 12 branches (the 11 distilled signatures plus the libxml2_6325 _h1 half) carry the same real mechanism — VP CMP_MAP distance-bucket gradient that naive lacks — taken from the Layer-1 resolve pattern (label_source). That label STANDS as the analytic shape assignment; what is decidable:false is the INDEPENDENT real-data VERIFICATION (G2): no built tool produces a signal that confirms this mechanism without re-reading the resolve pattern itself.

notes.verdict: decidable:false for the whole shape. This is the canonical G3 case: the mechanism is genuine but leaves no terminal-corpus fingerprint independent of the circular 'a resolving seed contains the answer'. Three distinct terminal-corpus framings were already refuted in round-0; the one unused built tool (byte_freq_ratio) would be circular and non-discriminating. Inventing a fourth would be the multiple-comparisons / chase-100% failure mode the design explicitly forbids.
notes.what_would_change_this: A NEW measurement source that captures the search TRAJECTORY rather than the terminal corpus — e.g. a corpus-admission timeline (seed save times + parent operand-distance, showing VP saved a monotone sequence of decreasing-residual near-misses while naive saved none). That is a coverage_timeseries / seed_lineage-with-distance descriptor that is NOT built and is gated by data_realities (CMP_MAP admission is not lineage-tagged). Until such a tool exists, this shape stays decidable:false rather than mislabeled.
notes.corpus_feasibility: Even setting discriminability aside, on-disk corpora exist only for harfbuzz + sqlite3 (4 of 12 branches); bloaty/lcms/libxml2 depend on DB seed sets. But corpus availability is moot here because the binding constraint is discriminability, not data access.

monotonic_superset_restorations.reason: round-1 (round:2) declared the whole shape decidable:false based on s4 targets (harfbuzz/sqlite3); on sB corpora vp_basin_escape's value_distance descriptor validated bloaty_147/lcms_2147/lcms_2417. Monotonic-superset invariant: restored verbatim; shape decidable flipped to true (partial).
